description: This file defines functions and types related to handling examples, assets, and page instances in an Astro project, including schema validation with zod, file system operations, and path manipulations.

methods.name: getExamplesAssets
methods.description: Returns a list of asset paths from the examples directory, recursively collecting files excluding '.astro' files.

methods.name: getAliasedExamplesPages
methods.description: Filters a list of AstroInstance pages to include only those with aliases.

methods.name: getExampleNameFromPagePath
methods.description: Extracts the example name from a given page path using regex matching.

methods.name: getExamplesAssetsRecursively
methods.description: Recursively traverses the source directory to collect asset file paths, excluding '.astro' files.

methods.name: sanitizeAssetPath
methods.description: Sanitizes and formats asset paths, ensuring consistent use of forward slashes.

methods.name: isAliasedAstroInstance
methods.description: Type guard to determine if an AstroInstance has aliases, indicating it is an AliasedAstroInstance.
